K=function(K,k,s,F,t,R)return f(q,{K,k;s;F;t;R},v,e)end return K end return(r(255888+15884908,{}))(e(t))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[v(-460927+515023)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
